title: Wisteria Alba | White Flowering Deciduous Hardy Climbing Garden Shrub Plant (9cm, 20-30cm)
features: Characteristics: Deciduous climbers, drooping stems produce clusters of light-green pinnate leaves and bright pea-like white flowers
Height & Spread: Grows to around 9m in height, spreads to roughly 5m wide.

Watering: Wisteria require regular water in the beginning. Once these plants are well established they only require watering during periods of dry weather, water until soil is completely moist and apply directly at soil level.

Planting Instructions: Can be planted in any type of soil. provided it is moist but well drained, add compost if soil is in poor condition. Can be planted in partial shade but will only flower in full sun. Space plants 10-15 feet apart.
